<?php namespace {{ namespace }}; use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model; use Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Eloquent\CastsAttributes; class {{ class }} implements CastsAttributes { /** * Cast the given value. * * @param array<string, mixed> $attributes */ public function get(Model $model, string $key, mixed $value, array $attributes): mixed { return $value; } /** * Prepare the given value for storage. * * @param array<string, mixed> $attributes */ public function set(Model $model, string $key, mixed $value, array $attributes): mixed { return $value; } }
